title: Tensura Slots
description: This Addon adds extra slots to the Tensura: Reincarnated Mod
body:
This is a mod addon for Tensura: Reincarnated that adds a very simple yet powerful QoL feature - it allows you to have an extra 3 Slots on the right-hand side of your screen, which are castable using customisable keybinds within the Controls.

The Secondary Slots will always display the next preset over to what you may currently have selected.
